section.base: relative min-h-[85vh] flex items-center justify-center px-4 pt-20 pb-0 overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-b from-[#f0f9ff] via-white to-transparent

backgroundElements.blob1: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-gradient-to-bl from-blue-500/5 to-teal-500/5 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob animation-delay-4000
backgroundElements.blob2: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-teal-500/5 to-blue-500/5 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob

content.container: relative z-10 max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-col lg:flex-row items-center gap-12
content.containerRTL: relative z-10 max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-col lg:flex-row-reverse items-center gap-12

textContent.badge: px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-medium bg-[#0a91b1]/10 text-[#0a91b1] border border-[#0a91b1]/20
textContent.title: text-4xl lg:text-6xl font-bold mb-6 leading-tight text-gray-900
textContent.primaryButton: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-[#0a91b1] hover:bg-[#097d99] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-lg transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5
textContent.secondaryButton: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 text-gray-900 px-8 py-4 rounded-lg font-semibold transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5 border border-gray-200

mobileImage.background: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500/10 to-teal-500/10 rounded-3xl blur-2xl transform rotate-6 scale-110
mobileImage.image: relative w-full max-w-[600px] mx-auto drop-shadow-xl transform hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300

desktopImage.background: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500/10 to-teal-500/10 rounded-3xl blur-2xl transform rotate-6 scale-110
desktopImage.image: relative w-full max-w-[800px] mx-auto drop-shadow-xl transform hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300

decorativeElements.circle1: absolute -bottom-4 -left-8 w-24 h-24 border-4 border-cyan-200 rounded-full transform rotate-12
decorativeElements.square: absolute -bottom-6 left-20 w-16 h-16 bg-blue-50 rounded-lg transform rotate-45
decorativeElements.circle2: absolute bottom-0 right-24 w-12 h-12 border-2 border-blue-200 rounded-full
decorativeElements.line1: absolute bottom-0 left-1/4 w-2 h-8 bg-cyan-100 rounded-full transform -rotate-12
decorativeElements.line2: absolute bottom-2 left-1/3 w-2 h-12 bg-blue-100 rounded-full transform rotate-12
decorativeElements.line3: absolute bottom-1 right-1/4 w-2 h-10 bg-cyan-100 rounded-full transform -rotate-6
decorativeElements.line4: absolute bottom-3 right-1/3 w-2 h-8 bg-blue-100 rounded-full transform rotate-6

bottomWave.container: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-12 overflow-hidden z-1
